# Agentic Workflows

Read only the files you need:
- `.github/skills/agentic-workflows/SKILL.md` — router skill for workflow create, debug, and upgrade tasks.
Load `.github/aw/*.md` prompt files from `https://github.com/github/gh-aw/blob/main/.github/aw`:
- `.github/aw/github-agentic-workflows.md` — GitHub Agentic Workflows.
- `.github/aw/agentic-chat.md` — AI assistant for creating clear, actionable task descriptions for GitHub.
